title: Audit inventory addendum for api_contract_check gate-quality blind spot
intent: Document in the audit inventory that api_contract_check is contract-only, backend-blind, and can be satisfied by blessing unreachable or fake frontend routes unless validated against the live mounted route table.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Appends a dated addendum to the backlog inventory documenting the api_contract_check gate-quality blind spot discovered during the 2026-06-11 classification pass.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Preserves a structural CI-gate finding in the inventory used for MVP-tag audit work, separate from the already-merged contract additions.

files.intent: Append a dated audit addendum documenting the api_contract_check backend-blind / bless-the-void failure mode and the recorded-not-done improvements.
verification: Review the appended addendum end to end
